channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【When "idle" isn't idle: how a Linux kernel optimization became a QUIC bug】当“空闲”不空闲时：Linux 内核优化如何成为 QUIC bug
item.description: 【 We investigated a bug where CUBIC's congestion window became pinned at its minimum floor, causing a performance to plummet. The fix involved correctly measuring idle periods to distinguish RTT wait times from actual application idleness. 】我们调查了一个错误，即 CUBIC 的拥塞窗口被固定在最低层，导致性能直线下降。该修复涉及正确测量空闲时间，以区分 RTT 等待时间和实际应用程序空闲时间。

item.title: 【Building for the future】为未来而建设
item.description: 【 This afternoon, we sent the following email to our global team. One of our core values at Cloudflare is transparency, and we believe it's important that you hear this directly from us because it’s a major moment at Cloudflare. 】今天下午，我们向我们的全球团队发送了以下电子邮件。 Cloudflare 的核心价值观之一是透明度，我们相信您直接从我们这里听到这一点非常重要，因为这是 Cloudflare 的一个重要时刻。

item.title: 【How Cloudflare responded to the “Copy Fail” Linux vulnerability】Cloudflare 如何应对“复制失败”Linux 漏洞
item.description: 【 When a critical Linux kernel privilege escalation was publicly disclosed, Cloudflare's security and engineering teams detected, investigated, and mitigated the threat across our global fleet, confirming zero customer impact and no malicious exploitation. 】当关键的 Linux 内核权限升级被公开披露时，Cloudflare 的安全和工程团队检测、调查并缓解了我们全球机群中的威胁，确认客户影响为零且没有恶意利用。

item.title: 【When DNSSEC goes wrong: how we responded to the .de TLD outage】当 DNSSEC 出错时：我们如何应对 .de TLD 中断
item.description: 【 On May 5, 2026, DENIC published broken DNSSEC signatures for the .de TLD, making millions of domains unreachable. Here's what 1.1.1.1 saw, how serve stale cushioned the impact, and how we restored resolution. 】2026 年 5 月 5 日，DENIC 发布了 .de TLD 的损坏的 DNSSEC 签名，导致数百万个域名无法访问。以下是 1.1.1.1 中看到的情况、服务陈旧如何缓冲影响以及我们如何恢复分辨率。

item.title: 【Code Orange: Fail Small is complete. The result is a stronger Cloudflare network】橙色代码：小失败已完成。结果是更强大的 Cloudflare 网络
item.description: 【 We have completed a massive engineering effort to make our infrastructure more resilient. Through new tools like Snapstone and the Engineering Codex, we've implemented safer configuration changes and automated best practices to prevent future incidents. 】我们已经完成了大量的工程工作，使我们的基础设施更具弹性。通过 Snapstone 和 Engineering Codex 等新工具，我们实施了更安全的配置更改和自动化最佳实践，以防止未来发生事故。

item.title: 【Introducing Dynamic Workflows: durable execution that follows the tenant】引入动态工作流程：遵循租户的持久执行
item.description: 【 Dynamic Workflows is a library that lets you route durable execution to tenant-provided code on the fly. Built on Dynamic Workers, it enables platforms to serve millions of unique workflows at near-zero idle cost. 】动态工作流是一个库，可让您动态地将持久执行路由到租户提供的代码。它建立在动态工作人员的基础上，使平台能够以接近零的闲置成本为数百万个独特的工作流程提供服务。

item.title: 【Post-quantum encryption for Cloudflare IPsec is generally available】Cloudflare IPsec 的后量子加密已普遍可用
item.description: 【 Cloudflare IPsec now has generally available support for post-quantum encryption via hybrid ML-KEM. We’ve confirmed interoperability with Cisco and Fortinet. 】Cloudflare IPsec 现在普遍支持通过混合 ML-KEM 进行后量子加密。我们已确认与 Cisco 和 Fortinet 的互操作性。

item.title: 【Agents can now create Cloudflare accounts, buy domains, and deploy】代理现在可以创建 Cloudflare 帐户、购买域名和部署
item.description: 【 Starting today, agents can now be Cloudflare customers. They can create a Cloudflare account, start a paid subscription, register a domain, and get back an API token to deploy code right away. Humans can be in the loop to grant permission, but there’s no need to go to the dashboard, copy and paste API tokens, or enter credit card details. 】从今天开始，代理现在可以成为 Cloudflare 客户。他们可以创建 Cloudflare 帐户、启动付费订阅、注册域并获取 API 令牌以立即部署代码。人类可以在循环中授予权限，但无需转到仪表板、复制和粘贴 API 令牌或输入信用卡详细信息。

item.title: 【Shutdowns, power outages, and conflict: a review of Q1 2026 Internet disruptions】关闭、断电和冲突：2026 年第一季度互联网中断回顾
item.description: 【 The first quarter of 2026 saw a surge in Internet disruptions, from nationwide shutdowns in Uganda and Iran to unprecedented drone strikes on cloud infrastructure. We explore the data behind these events using Cloudflare Radar. 】2026 年第一季度，互联网中断激增，从乌干达和伊朗全国范围内的关闭到云基础设施遭受前所未有的无人机袭击。我们使用 Cloudflare Radar 探索这些事件背后的数据。

item.title: 【Making Rust Workers reliable: panic and abort recovery in wasm‑bindgen】让 Rust Workers 可靠：wasm-bindgen 中的恐慌和中止恢复
item.description: 【 Panics in Rust Workers were historically fatal, poisoning the entire instance. By collaborating upstream on the wasm‑bindgen project, Rust Workers now support resilient critical error recovery, including panic unwinding using WebAssembly Exception Handling. 】Rust Workers 的恐慌在历史上是致命的，毒害了整个实例。通过与 wasm-bindgen 项目上游合作，Rust Workers 现在支持弹性关键错误恢复，包括使用 WebAssembly 异常处理进行恐慌解除。
